Class Student

java.lang.Object
kbtu.model.user.User
kbtu.model.user.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
GraduateStudent, SeniorStudent
public class Student extends User
Represents a bachelor student in the university system. This class handles course registration, academic performance tracking, GPA calculation, and extracurricular activities.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    static final int

      public static final int MAX_FAILS
      Maximum allowed failed attempts before registration is blocked.

  • Constructor Details

    • Student

      public Student(String id, String username, String password, String fullName, String email, int yearOfStudy, String major)

  • Method Details

    • registerCourse

      public boolean registerCourse(String courseCode, int credits) throws CreditLimitException, MaxFailsException
      Registers student for a course after validating credit and fail limits.
      Parameters:
      courseCode - The unique identifier of the course.
      credits - The number of credits the course provides.
      Returns:
      true if registration is successful.
      Throws:
      CreditLimitException - if adding credits would exceed MAX_CREDITS.
      MaxFailsException - if student already failed this course MAX_FAILS times.

    • addMark

      public void addMark(String courseCode, Mark mark)
      Adds a mark for a course and triggers GPA recalculation. Increments failedCount if the letter grade is "F".
      Parameters:
      courseCode - Code of the course to add the mark for.
      mark - The Mark object containing evaluation details.

    • viewMarks

      public void viewMarks()
      Prints a detailed view of all course marks, letter grades, and total points.

    • viewTranscript

      public void viewTranscript()
      Displays the full academic transcript including GPA, Major, and Year of Study.

    • rateTeacher

      public void rateTeacher(Teacher teacher, int rating, String comment)
      Submits a rating and comment for a specific teacher.

    • joinOrganization

      public void joinOrganization(String orgName)
      Adds the student to an organization.
      Parameters:
      orgName - Name of the organization to join.

    • leaveOrganization

      public void leaveOrganization(String orgName)
      Removes the student from an organization.
      Parameters:
      orgName - Name of the organization to leave.
